title: Cobblemon 100 Days Modpack
description: The BEST Modpack for the Cobblemon 100 Days Challenge created by Pocketcraft
body:
# Pocketcraft’s Official Cobblemon 100 Days Modpack

### About the Modpack
Hey everyone! I’m Pocketcraft, and this is the exact modpack I used in my 100 Days Hardcore Cobblemon Challenge video. After so many of you asked for the download, I’m excited to finally share it!

This pack is built specifically for the 100 Days format—whether you're doing your own challenge, filming content, or just want an optimized and immersive Cobblemon experience.

### What’s Included?
This modpack enhances the core Cobblemon 1.6 gameplay while staying lightweight and smooth for performance:

### Trainer Battles & Mega Evolutions

Radical Cobblemon Trainers + Trainers API: NPC trainers and gym battles that make your world feel alive.

Mega Showdown: Adds support for Mega Evolutions.

CobbleDollars: Adds a simple in-game economy system.

### Quality of Life Tools

Cobblemon Box Link & Pasture Collector: Manage your Pokémon from anywhere and adds the ability to create pasture block farms to easily farm rare resources.

Capture XP & Spawn Notifications: Track progress and get notified when Pokémon appear as well as gain experience from catching Pokemon which is huge!

Day Counter: Perfect for keeping track of your hardcore journey.

### Exploration & UI Enhancements

Xaero’s Minimap & XaerosCobblemon: Navigate easily, keep track of important locations and never miss a rare spawn.

Cobblemon PokeNav: Allows you to know what Pokemon spawn in your area, making it far easier to hunt rare Pokemon

### Survival Features

Cobbreeding: Breed Pokémon naturally in your world.

SimpleTMs & Fight and Flight Reborn: Adds tms to the game providing a more customized experience. Also causes Pokemon to attack you like in Legends Arceus

Trinkets & LivelierPokemon: Add extra immersion and utility.

### Performance Mods

Includes Sodium, Lithium, and Fabric API for a smoother, lag-free experience—even while recording or streaming.

### Why Download This Modpack?
If you’ve watched my challenge video and want to try the same adventure—or film your own—this is the exact pack I used. It’s designed for:

- Hardcore survival with trainer battles
- Lightweight, performance-optimized gameplay
- Content creators or fans of structured challenges
- Anyone who wants a better Cobblemon survival experience

If you want to see this modpack in action, check out these videos: [100 Days Hardcore Nuzlocke Challenge](https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL7MWETmTY8IK4DCf2UYCREb4HjtLYVxS2)
